project-highlight.notes: Extract highlight framing, evidence, risk points, and interviewer-style deep-dive prompts.

resume-eval.notes: Evaluate resume-vs-JD match, evidence strength, weak signals, and follow-up questions.

mock-interview.notes: Generate role-specific interview flows from local evidence and optional research signals.

interview-retro.notes: Review interview performance, separate knowledge gaps from expression gaps, and build a next-step practice plan.
